name: Zester Greze
description: The protagonist. He was originally a commoner, and was appointed as a baron when he became a military officer.

name: Aculeatus
description: Brother to [Ventricosus](https://anilist.co/character/124216/Ventricosus), ruler of the Admirabilis.

name: Aoi Harukawa
description: Another member of the trio who went to search the Summer Ghost. She is a junior in high school and is heavily bullied by her classmates. Before meeting the summer ghost she even considered committing suicide. But later she learns to stand up to the bullies and take actions.

name: CoCo
description: A feminine looking boy with long black hair, who Pico initially believes to be a girl. CoCo has sexual relations with both Pico and Chico. After inadvertantly causing some friction in their relationship, CoCo decides to distance himself from Pico and Chico, though they find him again at Tokyo Tower. Little is known of him, but he appears to be some sort of spirit. He is also the main uke of the three, but this can be reversed. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Cortana
description: AI character of the Halo franchise. In Halo Legends episode "Origins" she tells the story of the origins of Halo and the forerunners. Also appears in "Odd One Out".

name: Erhart Hawke
description: He's the deputy head magician. He's also Albert's brother.

name: FUSHI
description: A fluffy sea slug who serves as Yachiyo's companion and guides the girls through Tsukuyomi. For some reason, it views Kaguya and the Inudoge as enemies.

name: Fyshe Blundell
nativeName: フィシュ・ブランデル
description: An ambassador dispatched from the Earthworld Empire to the Kingdom of Natra. A calm and capable young bureaucrat who has earned the trust of Princess Lowellmina as her aide back in the Empire. She keeps a close eye on Wein's talent and movements. (Source: Official Site, translated)

description: Hae-Su is an independence activist and member of an independence movement for Korea.

name: Hata no Kokoro
description: Hata no Kokoro is a menreiki youkai created by Hata no Kawakatsu. She hardly displays any emotion by herself, instead relying on her masks to do so. She was introduced as the main antagonist of Hopeless Masquerade, and later appeared in Urban Legend in Limbo and Antinomy of Common Flowers as a playable character. description: Toujou was a first year and used to be a pitcher during his junior-high school days. After the third years graduate, he had a chance to play in a match as a center fielder.

name: Honne Nohotoke
description: Honne Nohotoke is a minor character who appears infrequently in the Infinite Stratos series. She is one of Ichika Orimura's classmates and enjoys eating snacks. She is affectionately called "Nohohon-san" by others. __Appearance:__ Honne Nohotoke has sleepy yellow eyes and pink shoulder length hair, most of which hangs free, the exception being two small pigtails on either side of her head held in place by yellow hair ties. name: Jagi
description: Jagi is the third of the four Hokuto brothers. Deceptive and evil, Jagi stops at nothing to win and frequently uses dirty tricks during battle. After a botched attempt at killing Kenshiro, he is left with a hideously disfigured head as a reminder of his failure. Consequently, he hides his head by wearing an iron helmet.
